summary: Created call_analyzer.py with analyze/patterns/report subcommands. Report shows 19 calls, 124.8s avg duration, 31.6% are substantive (2-5min). Pattern extraction uses /zo/ask for semantic topic/quality classification. All topics currently hardcoded general_advisory - confirms D2.3 need.
broadcast: Call data: 19 calls, 6 substantive (>2min), 5 drop-offs (<10s). Topics all general_advisory. Transcript field at message.artifact.transcript in raw_data.
